execution_summary: The Docker environment based on rocker/tidyverse:4.2.2 was generated and built successfully after removing the version-constrained lavaan specification. The container mounted the provided data and executed the custom driver script Popper_Replication.R, which loaded the two CSV datasets, cleaned focal parcels, fitted the preregistered SEM Model 1 with lavaan, and wrote a summary to /app/data/results.txt (mapped to replication_data/results.txt on host). No further debugging was required after the script rewrite. All steps matched the preregistered plan (correlation, SEM fitting, extraction of OPEN→LEAD coefficient).

code_executed.logs:
Locating datasets…
Correlation data and CFA/SEM data found.
Fitting SEM Model 1…
Results written to /app/data/results.txt
Done.
code_executed.environment: R 4.2.2 (rocker/tidyverse) with lavaan, dplyr, tidyr, psych

results.hypothesis_tested: H4-Replication: Higher Openness to Experience will be positively associated with greater Leadership-Shaping Experiences (standardised β > 0).

tables.table_description: Text file summarising coefficient and model fit indices.
